Actions.Text: AMEND AND RECOMMIT TO GOVERNMENTAL OPERATIONS

Title: Establishes standards for the reuse of deconstructed building materials
Summary: Establishes standards for the reuse of deconstructed building materials; requires the uniform building code to set standards for salvage lumber; requires the secretary of state to develop a program for grading salvage lumber for structural purposes.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the executive law, in relation to establishing standards for the reuse of deconstructed building materials
